docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZHAO, QING JUN AS TO DEFENDANT SILVER STAR COACH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
